creator: michiel@vanbaak.eu
text:
Created attachment 249967
0001-multimedia-tautulli-Update-to-2.13.4.patch

poudriere ok
runs in production on my setup (14 amd64)

Main reason I updated this port is the fix for newer sqlite3 versions.
In the older versions, double quotes were used for values, where it should be single quotes.

Fix was released in tautulli 2.12.4, but while at it I patched it to the latest version.

Updates between the current port and this update:
